verdict_reasoning: Three bounded scopes completed and verified locally: (A) Frontend AI Analysis UI is now wired to the BFF advisory-only AI seam — loads latest run on mount, dispatches new runs with claimId, renders providerMode, modelName, summary, recommendedAction (read-only), policyCoverageExplanation, riskLevel, confidence, findings/evidence/risks, cost/tokens, and all 7 guardrail pills (advisoryOnly+requiresHumanReview=true; every Can-* authority flag=false). (B) Backend DeepSeek provider gained bounded retry (max 2 attempts default) for safe transient failures (408/429/500/502/503/504/timeout) with sanitized error messages — auth/validation failures (400/401/403) never retry. (C) 9 untracked architecture docs + 8 prior report dirs classified in a triage note without deletion. Backend build PASS, tests 119/119 (113 prior + 6 new retry tests R6-R11), frontend build PASS 108 modules, Mock smoke PASS, real DeepSeek opt-in smoke returned HTTP 200 in ~6.7s (run_a88dc9d0; 708 tokens; deepseek-v4-flash). Independent inspector CLEARED 12/12 with zero warnings, zero failures.
